scripts.dev: CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=true WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false WRANGLER_WRITE_LOGS=false node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js dev --env-file wrangler.no-secrets --test-scheduled
scripts.typegen: CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=false WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false WRANGLER_WRITE_LOGS=false wrangler types --env-file wrangler.no-secrets --env-interface CloudflareBindings
